xmldoc.short_description: load data from .nh5 or .mat file into Nelson's workspace.

param_input_item.param_description: forces to read file as nh5 or mat.
string: Names of variables to load into Nelson's workspace.

param_output_item.param_description: a structure with variables name as fieldnames.

description.p: load loads data from .nh5 or .mat file to Nelson's workspace.
Classdef objects saved by Nelson are restored as classdef objects when their class definition is available on the path.
